MASHSHIELDER-CAMELOT_RAM.description: #Deal damage equal to your current Block.

MASHSHIELDER-REPRISAL.description: #Deal !D! damage, plus !PerHit! for each enemy hit your Block stopped this turn.

MASHSHIELDER-VIVID_IRON_DANCE.descriptio: #Deal !D! damage twice. Gain !B! Block after each hit.

MASHSHIELDER-CYLINDER_DISCHARGE.descript: #Consume all your *NP *Charge. Deal !D! damage for every 10 consumed.

MASHSHIELDER-PARADOX_CYLINDER.descriptio: #Lose !HpLoss! HP. Gain !B! Block and !Provoke! *Intercept this turn.

MASHSHIELDER-MOBILE_WALL.title: Mobile Wall

MASHSHIELDER-IRON_WILL.title: Iron Will
MASHSHIELDER-IRON_WILL.description: #At the end of your turn, gain !IronWill! Block.
MASHSHIELDER-WALL_DOCTRINE.title: Wall Doctrine
MASHSHIELDER-WALL_DOCTRINE.description: #Your first Block card each turn grants !WallDoctrine! *NP *Charge.
MASHSHIELDER-CONCEPTUAL_AMMO.title: Conceptual Ammunition
MASHSHIELDER-CONCEPTUAL_AMMO.description: #Once per turn, your Attacks remove one buff from the enemy hit.

MASHSHIELDER-ORTINAX_SERVOS.title: Ortinax Servomotors
MASHSHIELDER-ORTINAX_SERVOS.description: #At the end of your turn, if you played 2 or more Attacks: gain !OrtinaxServos! Block.
MASHSHIELDER-CHALDEA_LIBRARY.title: Chaldea Library
MASHSHIELDER-BLACK_BARREL_FULL_BURST.des: #NP: consumes ALL your Charge (min !ChargeCost!). Deal !D! *Black *Barrel damage, +!PerTen! per 10 Charge beyond the minimum. At 100: remove ALL the target's buffs.
MASHSHIELDER-ROUND_TABLE_PUNISHMENT.desc: #Deal damage equal to your Block to ALL enemies.
MASHSHIELDER-PALADIN_ASSAULT.title: Paladin's Assault
MASHSHIELDER-PALADIN_ASSAULT.description: #Can only be played in *Ortinax or *Paladin form. Deal !D! damage twice. Gain !B! Block.
MASHSHIELDER-DAWN_STRIKE.title: Dawn Strike
MASHSHIELDER-DAWN_STRIKE.description: #Deal !D! damage. If this kills the target: gain !NpCharge! *NP *Charge and heal !H! HP.
MASHSHIELDER-RHONGOMYNIAD_REPLICA.title: Rhongomyniad Replica
MASHSHIELDER-RHONGOMYNIAD_REPLICA.descri: #NP: consumes ALL your Charge (min !ChargeCost!). Deal !D! *Black *Barrel damage, +!PerTen! per 10 Charge beyond the minimum, and apply !Vulnerable! *Vulnerable.
MASHSHIELDER-KNIGHTS_VOW.title: Knight's Vow
MASHSHIELDER-KNIGHTS_VOW.description: #Deal !D! damage. If you have !RequiredBlock! or more Block: gain !Strength! *Strength.
MASHSHIELDER-LORD_CHALDEAS.title: LORD CHALDEAS
MASHSHIELDER-LORD_CHALDEAS.description: #NP: consumes ALL your Charge (min !ChargeCost!). Gain !B! *Bulwark Block, +!PerTen! per 10 Charge beyond the minimum.
MASHSHIELDER-LORD_CAMELOT.title: LORD CAMELOT
MASHSHIELDER-LORD_CAMELOT.description: #NP: consumes ALL your Charge (min !ChargeCost!). Gain !B! *Bulwark Block (+!PerTen! per 10 extra Charge), !Strength! *Strength and !Provoke! *Intercept this turn.
MASHSHIELDER-PALADIN_VOCATION.title: Paladin's Vocation
MASHSHIELDER-FOUS_MIRACLE.title: Fou's Miracle
MASHSHIELDER-FOUS_MIRACLE.description: #This combat, the first time you would die: survive at -1-+12+ HP and gain 25 Block.
MASHSHIELDER-LAST_ORDER.title: Chaldea's Last Order
MASHSHIELDER-UTOPIAN_FORTRESS.title: Utopian Fortress
MASHSHIELDER-UTOPIAN_FORTRESS.descriptio: #Gain Block equal to !Percent!% of your *NP *Charge /(without spending it).
MASHSHIELDER-GALAHADS_LEGACY.title: Galahad's Legacy
MASHSHIELDER-ABSOLUTE_WALL.title: Absolute Wall
MASHSHIELDER-ABSOLUTE_WALL.description: #Until your next turn, your HP cannot be reduced.
MASHSHIELDER-FAREWELL_SNOWFIELD.title: Farewell Snowfield
MASHSHIELDER-DEMI_SERVANT.title: Demi-Servant
MASHSHIELDER-DEMI_SERVANT.description: #At the start of your turn, gain !DemiServant! *Bulwark Block.
MASHSHIELDER-DISTANT_UTOPIA_CASTLE.title: Castle of the Distant Utopia
MASHSHIELDER-HOMUNCULUS_HEART.title: Homunculus Heart
MASHSHIELDER-HOMUNCULUS_HEART.descriptio: #Whenever you change form: draw -2-+3+ cards and gain -10-+15+ *NP *Charge.
MASHSHIELDER-SENPAI_PROMISE.title: Promise to Senpai
MASHSHIELDER-SENPAI_PROMISE.description: #When an enemy hit fails to get through your Block: gain !SenpaiPromise! *NP *Charge.
MASHSHIELDER-PIONEER_OF_THE_STARS.title: Pioneering Spirit of the Stars
MASHSHIELDER-PIONEER_OF_THE_STARS.descri: #The first NP card you play each combat costs no *NP *Charge.
MASHSHIELDER-LORD_CAMELOT_UNLEASHED.desc: #NP (!ChargeCost! Charge): gain !B! *Bulwark Block, !Strength! *Strength and !Provoke! *Intercept this turn. +!PerTen! Block per 10 Charge beyond the minimum.
MASHSHIELDER-LORD_CHALDEAS_UNLEASHED.des: #NP (!ChargeCost! Charge): gain !B! *Bulwark Block, +!PerTen! per 10 Charge beyond the minimum.
MASHSHIELDER-BLACK_BARREL_UNLEASHED.desc: #NP (!ChargeCost! Charge): deal !D! unblockable damage, +!PerTen! per 10 Charge beyond the minimum. Remove ALL the target's buffs.
MASHSHIELDER-BEHIND_ME_SENPAI.title: Behind Me!
MASHSHIELDER-BEHIND_ME_SENPAI.descriptio: #Until your next turn, you take all damage that pierces your allies' defenses.
MASHSHIELDER-GOLDEN_APPLE.title: Golden Apple
MASHSHIELDER-GOLDEN_APPLE.description: #Gain !Energy! Energy. Draw !C! card(s). The grind never ends.
MASHSHIELDER-MAPO_TOFU.title: Extra Spicy Mapo Tofu
MASHSHIELDER-MAPO_TOFU.description: #Heal !H! HP. Lose !HpLoss! HP. Delicious. Painful. Delicious.
MASHSHIELDER-INSUFFICIENT_QP.title: Insufficient QP!
MASHSHIELDER-INSUFFICIENT_QP.description: #Gain !Gold! gold. It will not be enough. It is never enough.
MASHSHIELDER-TEN_PULL_SUMMON.title: 10-Pull Summon
MASHSHIELDER-TEN_PULL_SUMMON.description: #Add !C! random card(s) from your character's pool to your hand, costing 0 this turn. May the gacha bless you.
MASHSHIELDER-BLACK_KEYS.title: Black Keys
MASHSHIELDER-BLACK_KEYS.description: #Deal !D! damage. Add a copy of this card to your discard pile. There are always more.
MASHSHIELDER-EXP_EMBER.title: EXP Ember
MASHSHIELDER-EXP_EMBER.description: #Upgrade !C! random card(s) in your hand for this combat. Everything is fodder.
MASHSHIELDER-PALINGENESIS.title: Palingenesis
MASHSHIELDER-PALINGENESIS.description: #Raise your Max HP by !H! and heal !H! HP. The Grail accepts your offering.
MASHSHIELDER-FOU_BEAST_IV.title: Fou (Beast IV?)
MASHSHIELDER-FOU_BEAST_IV.description: #Deal !D! damage. If this kills the target: heal !H! HP and gain !NpCharge! *NP *Charge. Kyu.
MASHSHIELDER-MULTIPURPOSE_SHIELD.title: Multipurpose Shield
MASHSHIELDER-MULTIPURPOSE_SHIELD.descrip: #Gain !B! Block, draw !C! card(s) and gain !NpCharge! *NP *Charge. Cutting board, frying pan, sled... and also a shield.
MASHSHIELDER-BUSTER_MASH.title: Buster
MASHSHIELDER-ARTS_MASH.title: Arts
MASHSHIELDER-QUICK_MASH.title: Quick
MASHSHIELDER-CYLINDER_VENT.title: Cylinder Vent
MASHSHIELDER-CYLINDER_SEAL.title: Cylinder Seal
MASHSHIELDER-COMBAT_ANALYSIS.title: Combat Analysis
MASHSHIELDER-COMBAT_ANALYSIS.description: #At the start of your turn: gain !CombatAnalysis! *Critical *Stars. Whenever you gain *Critical *Ready: draw 1 card.
MASHSHIELDER-FORM_DRILL.title: Form Drill
MASHSHIELDER-FORM_DRILL.description: #Switch to your other form. In Paladin form: gain !NpCharge! *NP *Charge instead.+ Draw !C! card(s).+
